source: PPChu冲鸭小分队—地道单词 + 程同学 课堂精练

words.example: The sunset was absolutely gorgeous.
The mountain view was breathtaking.
The fireworks display was spectacular.
The palace has a magnificent exterior.
The craftsmanship of this watch is exquisite.
The car has a glossy finish.
The smartphone has a sleek design.
Shanghai is a cosmopolitan city.
The garden was full of lush greenery.
Her apartment is always spotless.
The soothing music helped me fall asleep.
The kitchen was filled with aromatic dishes.
I love the fragrance of flowers in spring.
My grandmother makes scrumptious dumplings.
The lake was tranquil and serene.
The shimmering water reflected the sunlight.
She's very down-to-earth despite being famous.
He is one of the most well-mannered people I know.
My parents are very open-minded about my career choices.
She is compassionate towards everyone around her.
Chinese people are generally very industrious.
He's a conscientious worker who never misses deadlines.
She's a versatile musician who plays multiple instruments.
He stays level-headed even under pressure.
She's quick-witted and always has clever responses.
He's a forward-looking leader who plans ahead.
Despite being a professor, she's very approachable.
He's always considerate of other people's feelings.
My grandmother is quite frugal but very generous with family.
She's an ambitious young entrepreneur.
He's very articulate and expresses ideas clearly.
The locals are incredibly hospitable to visitors.
The baby has chubby cheeks.
She has a slim figure.
He's well-built from years of training.
The dancer moved in a graceful manner.
My grandfather has salt-and-pepper hair.
She has sparkling eyes full of curiosity.
The child came in from the cold with rosy cheeks.
Beijing is a bustling metropolis.
The city has invested heavily in infrastructure.
The nightlife here is vibrant and exciting.
The old town is enchanting with its narrow streets.
The city skyline is full of high-rise buildings.
The apartment is spacious and well-lit.
My old dormitory room was quite cramped.
We visited a time-honored temple.
The restaurant has elegant interior décor.
The modern office has glass curtain walls.
We walked along the winding paths in the park.
The garden has beautiful flowerbeds.
There are traditional pavilions by the lake.
The park has a peaceful ambience.
After the hike, I felt refreshed and invigorated.
I often hang out with my friends on weekends.
We like to have a barbecue in the park.
We go hiking during holidays.
I used to go roller-skating every weekend.
The park offers various recreational activities.
Lions are fierce predators.
The kitten is so fluffy and adorable.
Pandas are absolutely adorable creatures.
Koalas look so cuddly.
We should protect endangered animals.
This backpack is very durable.
This handy gadget fits right in my pocket.
She wore a funky hat to the party.
He still drives his beat-up old car.
I just bought a brand-new laptop.
This restaurant is affordable and tasty.
This phone has an excellent performance-price ratio.

categories.category: 地道口语表达 Idiomatic Expressions

words.example: The stuff in that store is very pricey.
Average folks can't possibly afford cars like that.
My iPad is pretty fun to use.
I adore that singer.
I spotted some squirrels in the park. It's a nice spot for a picnic.
Trips to other countries can be really eye-opening.
This job offers a decent salary.
My boss is kind of hard to get along with.
The speaking test is just a piece of cake if you prepare well.
The noise has been getting on my nerves lately.
At parties, we just kick back and relax.
I've got loads of work to get through before tomorrow.
The plot of that movie didn't make any sense.
Beijing has traditions, modern lifestyles, tasty food... you name it.

words.word: kill two birds with one stone
words.example: By cycling to work, I kill two birds with one stone — exercise and commute.
This is the best movie I've ever seen, hands down.
You'll get the hang of it shortly.
They lost that match. What a shame!
I am a movie buff. I go to the movies whenever I can.
I totally freaked out when I heard the news.
I often go to the gym to let off steam.
I felt under the weather so I stayed home.
That restaurant was a bit pricey.
That director makes lousy movies.
A nine-to-five job can really be a drag.
The comedy show was hilarious.
After the exam, I was completely wiped-out.
I'm starving — let's grab some food.

categories.category: 词汇升级替换 Vocabulary Upgrades

words.example: The lecture was really stimulating.
I wanted to escape the humdrum routine.
The training session was grueling.
We had a blast at the concert.
Let's wrap it up and go home.
Could you do me a favor?

words.meaning: 尽最大努力(替代try my best)
words.example: I'll give it my best shot in the exam.
The interview was pretty tough.
I'm exhausted. Time to hit the sack.

words.meaning: 晒太阳(替代sit in the sun)
words.example: Let's go to the beach and catch some rays.
I need to economize this month.
Time is precious to me.
She always wears trendy outfits.
That restaurant has a really classy vibe.
My desk is always cluttered with papers.

categories.category: 情感与偏好表达 Emotions & Preferences

words.example: I'm fascinated by ancient history.
I'm really into photography these days.
Horror movies are not my cup of tea.
I have mixed feelings about living in a big city.
I was in low spirits after failing the exam.
Littering in public places makes my blood boil.
I got cold feet before my first public speech.
I was torn between studying abroad and staying home.
Technology is constantly evolving.
I visit my grandparents every now and then.
I go to the cinema once in a blue moon.
I exercise on a weekly basis.
I hardly ever eat fast food.
The summer here is scorching.
It gets chilly in the evenings.
It was freezing cold outside.
The sky was overcast all day.
The streets were filthy after the storm.

words.meaning: 中国的政治、经济、文化的中心    the political，economic and cultural center of China

words.word: 自然风光 Gardens and Parks
words.meaning: 自然风光 Gardens and Parks

categories.category: PPChu冲鸭小分队—地道单词 · 杂项 5 (demo)

words.word: The stuff in that store is very pricey
words.meaning: 东西，口语里面等于things，但请国内同学们牢记stuff永远不能加复数

words.word: There're lots of fun things to do in the classroom
words.meaning: = interesting （请朋友们注意fun作形容词是其实并不是funny “搞笑的”意思，但他在日常生活里出现的频率一点也不比funny低）

words.word: 此处系口语用法。本书中的“sooooooo”也是同一种用法
words.meaning: 是很地道的英文，“让人大开眼界的”，他的名词eye-opener在《剑8》P.140也出现了

words.word: This job offers a decent salary and an impressive set of benefits（工作的“福利”在地道英文里就直接用benefits）
words.meaning: 上大学英语课时老师可能会告诉你这个词是“体面的”，但在国外真实生活里这个词更多的时候表示的是“不错的，挺好的”意思=quite good

words.word: I often hang out in bars at weekends
words.meaning: 玩儿。很多时候可以代替play，注意这个词组后面不能跟宾语

words.word: My boss is kind of hard to get along with.

words.meaning: like作为连词在口语中极度常用，可以表示“比如说”、“像是……”、“差不多是”

words.word: Beijing is exciting for its nightlife. And it's culturally attractive as well

words.meaning: 在你思考的时候可以表示自然地停顿，两个词不要发音太清楚，含含糊糊地哼出来就行了

words.word: The IELTS speaking test is just a breeze if you know all the tricks about it.
We go hiking and camping during holidays.
words.meaning: 表示“在……时候”，极度常用，但可惜国内考生普遍不用

words.word: He knows computers backwards and forwards
Getting the homework done everyday is no picnic
The noise has been getting on my nerves lately
At parties, we just kick back and relax
I stayed if France for a couple of weeks.
I went there with a bunch of new friends
I just bought dozens of gifts online
The plot of that movie didn't make any sense
Doing the dishes would be the last thing I want to do.
words.meaning: 是我在人生里最不想做的事

words.word: Lots of people got fired. Too bad. But that's the way the ball bounces in recession(经济衰退）
words.meaning: 命中注定就这样了（无奈），一般说这句话的时候，人们还要耸耸肩膀（shrug their shoulders）

words.word: I've never used a word processor before. Don't worry you'll get the hang of it shortly.
words.meaning: 基本上了解了怎样做某事

words.word: If you just memorize all the answers, even if you get all the answers down pat, there may still be questions you haven't though of during the test. So,…
words.meaning: 完全掌握了（请注意这里的pat不是我，是小写的）

words.word: They lost that match. What a shame!
words.meaning: 太可惜了（在这里shame跟羞耻无关）

words.word: I am a movie buff. I got to the movies whenever I can find some free time.
words.meaning: “迷”，语气一个比一个强，最后的mania基本上就是痴了

words.word: I totally freaked out when I heard the news.
I often go to the gym to let off steam
When I feel under the weather, I just take a shower, which makes me feel less uncomfortable
That car was pricey. But he bought it without batting an eyelash（想都没想）.
A nine-to-five job can really be a drag.

words.word: preserve（但如果保护一个人还是用protect
words.meaning: 保护（某种资源，resources/old buildings/wild animals等）

words.word: it's a piece of cake = it's a snap = it's a breeze

words.meaning: 高素质的（说人一般不能用）

words.word: don't even have a clue about it
be torn between A and B
